name: Why do I need AEO if I already do SEO?

mainEntity.name: Why do I need AEO if I already do SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI models don't crawl and index websites the same way traditional search engines do. They require highly structured, explicit data to understand your business, offerings, and expertise accurately. Without AEO, even a well-SEO'd site may be invisible to AI, meaning your competitors could be cited while you're ignored. AEO ensures your business is present in the answers users receive from AI, which is becoming a primary way people find information and make decisions.
